refnamediv.refpurpose: Reduce haze in an RGB image.

refsynopsisdiv.title: Syntax
refsynopsisdiv.synopsis: out = imreducehaze(image); out = imreducehaze(image, omega, t0, window)

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Uses a dark-channel transmission estimate and atmospheric-light recovery. The result is intended as a practical baseline for natural RGB images rather than a scene-specific dehazing model.

refsection.title: Examples
